## Overview

This class represents a sound-emitting point or area in a virtual environment, positioned and oriented by a 3D [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEObject/transform].

A spatial mixer, [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESpatialMixerDefinition], adds environmental effects to sound sources. To tie a mixer to a sound source, create a [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEMixerParameters] object and pass it into the `mixerParameters` argument of a sound event’s [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESoundEvent/init(engine:assetIdentifier:mixerParameters:)] initializer.

For an example that demonstrates sound sources, see [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/playing-sound-from-a-location-in-a-3d-scene].

# PHASESource

**Class**

An object that plays audio from a 3D location and orientation in a scene.

## Declaration

```swift
class PHASESource
```

## Overview

This class represents a sound-emitting point or area in a virtual environment, positioned and oriented by a 3D [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEObject/transform].

A spatial mixer, [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESpatialMixerDefinition], adds environmental effects to sound sources. To tie a mixer to a sound source, create a [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEMixerParameters] object and pass it into the `mixerParameters` argument of a sound event’s [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESoundEvent/init(engine:assetIdentifier:mixerParameters:)] initializer.

For an example that demonstrates sound sources, see [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/playing-sound-from-a-location-in-a-3d-scene].

## Creating a Source

- **init(engine:)**: Creates a single point in the environment from which sound emanates.
- **init(engine:shapes:)**: Creates a voluminous area in the environment from which sound emanates.

## Controlling Sound Volume

- **gain**: The amount of sound the source emanates.

## Inspecting the Shape

- **shapes**: An array of shapes that collectively define the audio-emitting surface area of a volumetric source.

## Soundscape Creation

- **PHASEListener**: A central point of reference that defines the location within the scene that’s most audible to the user.
- **PHASEOccluder**: An object with a shape and position that blocks audio from reaching the listener.
- **PHASEObject**: An object in the scene.
- **PHASEShape**: A collection of points that connect to form a 3D volume.
- **PHASEShape.Element**: An object that describes the characteristics of a physical surface.
- **PHASEMaterial**: Surface characteristics that determine the acoustic properties of an object.
- **PHASEMaterialPreset**: A collection of physical surfaces that each add a unique acoustic quality to your app’s audio.
- **PHASEMixerParameters**: An object that specifies a mixer for sound events and orients them in 3D space.

## Inherits From

- PHASEObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSCopying
- NSObjectProtocol
